title: logfia heterantha
side_effects: Logfia heterantha can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, which can manifest as skin irritation, hives, and respiratory issues. Ingesting the plant's extracts can lead to gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Additionally, Logfia heterantha may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners, and decrease their effectiveness. If used excessively or without proper knowledge, it may also cause liver and kidney damage in severe cases.
